title: <![CDATA[Oil prices to hit $150? How Indian stock markets may react as Iran war rages on]]>
description: Oil prices have surged past $100 per barrel amid escalating Iran–Israel tensions and fears of a prolonged closure of the Strait of Hormuz, a key global energy chokepoint.
